title: 2Beta
description: Bring back the Beta era, from 2011
body:
# 2Beta - Relive Minecraft's Beta Era

**2Beta** is more than a modpack—it's a portal back to Minecraft's raw, experimental days. This modpack brings the beta stage to life, recreating the quirks, charm, and chaos that made early Minecraft unforgettable.  

## Features

- **Classic Blocks & Items**: Rediscover blocks, items, and textures that were present in beta, from the iconic cobblestone paths to early, unfinished ores.  
- **Beta Mobs Return**: Encounter mobs as they once were, with old AI and behaviors that will challenge your survival instincts.  
- **Simpler, Messier Mechanics**: Experience crafting, farming, and building like the early days—sometimes glitchy, often unpredictable, always nostalgic.  
- **Beta Biomes & Worlds**: Explore landscapes that feel wild, incomplete, and mysterious, from forests with unusual generation to oceans that stretch endlessly.  
- **Hidden Nostalgia Easter Eggs**: Subtle nods to beta quirks and secrets tucked throughout the world, waiting for curious adventurers to find.  

## Why Play 2Beta?

Step into a version of Minecraft where everything feels unpolished, raw, and alive. Whether you grew up in the beta era or just want to see how the game started, **2Beta** captures the magic, messiness, and freedom that modern Minecraft often smooths over. Build, explore, and survive in a world where nostalgia reigns supreme, and every corner reminds you why beta Minecraft was unforgettable.  

> Dive back into the past. Experience the chaos. Relive the beta.
